registry.description: Groaning is the inner sound of the person or creation under the weight of what is wrong — the wordless, involuntary expression of longing for something better. The Hebrew vocabulary covers the heavy sigh, the roar of distress, the deep moan. The Greek adds a specifically theological dimension: Paul describes the whole creation groaning, and the Spirit groaning within believers with words too deep for speech (Romans 8). Groaning is not despair — it is the voice of hope that has not yet arrived at its destination.

speaking oppression and revolt,
conceiving and uttering from the heart lying words.

verses.esv_text: Isa 59:3 For your hands are defiled with blood and your fingers with iniquity ; your lips have spoken lies ; your tongue mutters wickedness .
verses.preview_html:
Isa 59:3 For your hands are defiled with blood
and your fingers with iniquity;
your lips have spoken lies;
your tongue mutters wickedness.

verses.esv_text: Isa 8:19 And when they say to you, “ Inquire of the mediums and the necromancers who chirp and mutter ,” should not a people inquire of their God ? Should they inquire of the dead on behalf of the living ?
verses.preview_html: Isa 8:19 And when they say to you, “Inquire of the mediums and the necromancers who chirp and mutter,” should not a people inquire of their God? Should they inquire of the dead on behalf of the living?

verses.esv_text: Jer 48:31 Therefore I wail for Moab ; I cry out for all Moab ; for the men of Kir-hareseth I mourn .

verses.esv_text: Job 27:4 my lips will not speak falsehood , and my tongue will not utter deceit .

Job 27:4 my lips will not speak falsehood,
and my tongue will not utter deceit.

verses.esv_text: Jos 1:8 This Book of the Law shall not depart from your mouth , but you shall meditate on it day and night , so that you may be careful to do according to all that is written in it. For then you will make your way prosperous , and then you will have good success .
